This section is for How Tos

How to Get a Tech Job

This section is about how to get a tech job

How to evaluate sources

This section is about how to evaluate sources, the difference between AI, search engines, and academic databases, and why it's important to have accurate information

View details »

How to Study

This section is about how to study. This includes why studying can be helpful, some ideas on how to take notes, potential software that might be helpful, and some suggestions on how to make your studying more efficient and helpful.

View details »

How to do Documentation

This is about comprehensive guide on the importance and methods of creating various types of documentation, including technical writing, README files, and code comments.

View details »

How to manage your time

A guide on time management, explaining the importance of optimizing efforts and reducing stress, and details various systems like Getting Things Done (GTD), the Pomodoro technique, Bullet journaling, and Most Important Thing (MIT). Also includes advice on using tools like calendars and overcoming roadblocks such as procrastination

View details »
